description: Glinded appears to provide an MCP server for "Memorial Videos." Its authentication is handled by a Clerk-hosted OAuth/OpenID Connect provider on glinded.com.
summary: Glinded exposes one OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp-detprm6tzq-uc.a.run.app, using Clerk-hosted OAuth 2.0 / OIDC metadata from clerk.glinded.com.

surfaces.name: Glinded for Memorial Videos MCP server
